name: Rupert Resources Ltd.
description: Rupert Resources Ltd. is a gold developer focused on the Ikkari discovery in the Central Lapland Greenstone Belt of Northern Finland, hosting approximately 4 million ounces of gold as part of the Rupert Lapland Project. The company also holds the past-producing Pahtavaara gold mine and mill in Finland, with Agnico Eagle holding a 14.9% strategic stake.
